keyword_hints.migration: Check src/db/migrations/, src/db/README.md, and python -m src.cli.main migrate.
keyword_hints.features: Check src/features/, src/cli/commands/features.py, src/features/README.md, and tests tied to features flows.
keyword_hints.airflow: Check ops/airflow/dags/, ops/airflow/README_FIX.md, and related tests under tests/db/ or DAG docs.
keyword_hints.candles: Check src/candles/, src/cli/commands/swap_sync.py, and parity or sync tests.
